tasks.label: check-flutter-cli
args: cd /d c:\Users\asus\Desktop\AqariSyria\flutter_app && where flutter && where flutter.bat && flutter.bat --version

tasks.label: push-flutter-app-to-github
args: cd /d c:\Users\asus\Desktop\AqariSyria\flutter_app && git init && git config user.name "hashash552004-sketch" && git config user.email "hashash552004-sketch@users.noreply.github.com" && git add . && git commit -m "Initial Flutter app version" && git branch -M main && git remote remove origin 2>nul || true && git remote add origin https://github.com/hashash552004-sketch/AqariSyria.git && git push -u origin main

tasks.label: init-and-push-github
